# Pull Request

## Description
<!-- Describe your changes concisely. -->

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test addition/improvement
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist
- [ ] `cargo fmt -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --all-features -- --test-threads=1` passes
- [ ] New code has corresponding tests
- [ ] Public API changes are documented in `docs/reference/api.md`

## Breaking Changes
<!-- If this PR changes any public API, list the changes here. -->

## Related Issues
<!-- e.g., "Closes #123" -->
